label: Dialog
summary: The native dialog in system-alert costume: titlebar, icon, message and button row over a dithered backdrop.
era: The system alert: titlebar, 32×32 icon, OK and Cancel, the box the operating system sent when it needed you.

classes.name: rs-dialog
classes.role: native <dialog> in alert-box costume; 8×8 dither backdrop

classes.name: rs-dialog__titlebar
classes.role: titlebar; carries the id aria-labelledby points at

a11y: Native <dialog> opened with showModal(): focus containment, Escape and the top layer come from the platform. aria-labelledby points at the titlebar text; the button row is a method="dialog" form.
